title: Kinexus Assistant
description: Orbital architecture narrative with Azure service orchestration and interactive flow playback.
longDescription: An interactive architecture storyboard that walks through user interaction, API management, orchestrator routing, and Azure data services in a cinematic diagram.

title: Azure Visualizer
description: Topology-focused mini-site for infrastructure relationship mapping and architecture storytelling.
longDescription: A focused space for visualizing Azure resource groups, links, and service boundaries with a strong systems-design lens.

title: Design Motion Lab
description: A motion playground for transitions, micro-interactions, and cinematic UI choreography.
longDescription: Experiment with staggered reveals, emphasis transitions, and motion timing patterns intended for premium interfaces.

title: Data Storyboard
description: Narrative-first page for framing telemetry and operational data as guided visual stories.
longDescription: A product-like storytelling canvas for sequencing system events, KPIs, and notable trends into digestible frames.

title: Internal Toolkit
description: A compact launch area for internal workflow tools and helper interfaces.
longDescription: A practical panel of internal productivity helpers wrapped in the same visual language as the broader dashboard ecosystem.

title: Prototype Atelier
description: A concept sandbox for future AI and product experiments under active iteration.
longDescription: This atelier showcases directional prototypes, interaction experiments, and early explorations before they graduate into featured experiences.
